category_sources: Official PROJ documentation describes development and use of the PROJ library.
source_facts.description identifies PROJ as a cartographic projections library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official PROJ site.
source_facts.repo uses the official OSGeo/PROJ repository name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to proj.org; official stable documentation is hosted under /en/stable/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/OSGeo/PROJ, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists PROJ coordinate transformation tools such as proj, cs2cs, geod, cct, and projinfo.
